◎年　　代　2018

◎简　　介  

　　A film about bipolar disorder and opioid addiction as seen through the life of three-time world champion surfer Andy Irons. Andy struggled with the same demons that millions of people worldwide battle with daily. Andy was an incredible presence on the world stage as the "People's Champion." He was the pride of Hawaii and revered around the world for his blue collar rise to fame...
trans_title: 安迪艾恩斯：上帝亲吻的宠儿
